data.title: RED test: _compact_preconditions() and snapshot-read path in ticket-lib.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract, and legacy-ticket graceful-degrade

## Objective
Write failing tests that assert the behavior of the new compaction and snapshot-read functions that will be added to ticket-lib.sh. Tests must fail (RED) before implementation runs.

## Test File
`tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh` (new file — fuzzy-matchable: normalized source `ticketlibsh` is a substring of normalized test `testpreconditionscompactionsh`? No. Must add .test-index entry.)

**Required .test-index entries:**
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh [test_compact_preconditions_writes_snapshot]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh [test_read_latest_handles_snapshot_format]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh [test_read_latest_retry_once_on_transient_miss]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_compact_preconditions_writes_snapshot:**
- Given: a ticket dir containing 3 PRECONDITIONS events (flat JSON files) with sequential timestamps
- When: `_compact_preconditions <ticket_dir> <epic_id>` is called
- Then: a single PRECONDITIONS-SNAPSHOT.json file exists; each original event file contains a `retired: true` marker in its filename (renamed or a marker file beside it)

**test_read_latest_handles_snapshot_format:**
- Given: a ticket dir where flat events have been compacted (PRECONDITIONS-SNAPSHOT.json present, original events retired)
- When: `_read_latest_preconditions <ticket_dir>` is called
- Then: returns the snapshot payload; exit 0

**test_read_latest_retry_once_on_transient_miss:**
- Given: a ticket dir where PRECONDITIONS-SNAPSHOT.json is transiently missing at first stat (simulated via a wrapper that removes then re-creates the file mid-read)
- When: `_read_latest_preconditions <ticket_dir>` is called
- Then: retries once and returns the snapshot payload on second attempt; exit 0

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh
- [ ] test_compact_preconditions_writes_snapshot fails RED (function not yet implemented)
  Verify: source plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh 2>/dev/null; declare -f _compact_preconditions | grep -q "_compact_preconditions" && echo "FAIL: function exists already" || echo "RED confirmed"
- [ ] test_read_latest_handles_snapshot_format fails RED
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh test_read_latest_handles_snapshot_format 2>&1 | grep -qiE "not found|error|FAIL"
- [ ] test_read_latest_retry_once_on_transient_miss fails RED
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-preconditions-compaction.sh test_read_latest_retry_once_on_transient_miss 2>&1 | grep -qiE "not found|error|FAIL"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for all 3 tests
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_compact_preconditions_writes_snapshot\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits without introducing new unrelated failures
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
